changes.description: Rewrote SKILL.md to strongly direct the model to write and execute a Python solver script instead of solving manually. Added a CRITICAL instruction at the top ('Never solve FJSP problems manually'), included a complete copy-paste-ready Python solver template with correct downtime handling (while-loop for iterative conflict resolution), simplified the overall document by removing verbose pseudocode sections (repair heuristic, constraint checking functions), and kept the output format specification concise.

root_cause: The model attempted to solve the fjsp-schedule problem by manually tracing through the greedy algorithm in text, generating only 167 output tokens before being cut off. The job-makespan task succeeded because the model independently chose to write a Python script. The fix was to make script-writing the explicit default approach in the skill.
